channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: There is only one person’ who can decide to end the war on Iran
item.description: Israeli journalist and writer, Gideon Levy, says the decision to end the Iran war rests only with US President Trump.

item.title: Five vessels attacked amid reports of Iranian drone boats, sea mines
item.description: Two oil tankers hit by explosive-laden boats in Iraqi waters amid reports Iran may be using unmanned surface vessels.

item.title: How is feminism being used to justify war in Iran?
item.description: Some supporters of the US-Israeli war on Iran are using the treatment of women in the country as a justification.

item.title: Fire erupts at Gaza camp after Israeli attack hits tents
item.description: Fire broke out at tents sheltering displaced Palestinians in Gaza’s Al-Ansar refugee camp after an Israeli strike.

item.title: Fuel tank fire rages in Bahrain after Iranian attack
item.description: Bahrain's interior ministry released footage of a massive blaze at a fuel storage facility following an Iranian attack.

item.title: UN Security Council adopts resolution condemning Iran’s attacks in the Gulf
item.description: UN Security Council draft resolution demanding Iran end its attacks on Gulf nations was cosponsored by 135 countries.

item.title: Who bombed the Iranian girls’ school, killing more than 170? What we know
item.description: The attack on Shajareh Tayyebeh Elementary School quickly became a focal point of concern over civilian casualties.

item.title: Israeli strike hits Beirut waterfront near tents of displaced
item.description: At least six people are dead from an Israeli strike on Beirut’s Ramlet al-Baida seafront.

item.title: Iran’s authorities warn against protests as Israel threatens Basij forces
item.description: Police chief says protesters seen as acting at the behest of the US and Israel will be treated as enemies.

item.title: Qatar PM urges resilience and unity amid Iran strikes
item.description: Qatar’s Prime Minister calls for strengthening the country’s ability to withstand “hardship” amid regional war.
